name: HR dependent benefits policy example
answer:
Employees may add eligible dependents to health coverage during open enrollment.
Employees may add dependents within 30 days of a qualifying life event.
Employees receive free gym membership.

sources.title: HR Dependent Benefits Policy
sources.content:
Employees may add eligible dependents to health coverage during open enrollment.
Employees may add dependents within 60 days of a qualifying life event with supporting documentation.
